commands.about:
Tickets on lihtne bot mida kasutada ning see on hästi konfigureeritav abibot.
Abi server: %s
käsud: Kirjuta `%s`
Alustamiseks kirjuta `%s`
commands.add.no_members: Sa pead mentionima kasutajaid keda lisada abipileti kanalisse
commands.add.no_permission: Sul ei ole luba, et inimesi siia abipileti kanalisse lisada
commands.add.no_everyone: You cannot add the `@everyone` role to a ticket
commands.addadmin.no_members: Sa pead mentionima kasutajat või rolli millele administraatori õigused anda
commands.addsupport.no_members: Sa pead mentionima kasutajat või rolli millele abi andja õigused anda
commands.blacklist.no_members: Sa pead mentionima kasutajat, millel blacklisti staatust muuta
commands.language.invalid: Sa pead täpsustama keele koodi või lippu. Saadavad keeled:\n%s
commands.open.too_many_tickets:
Abipiletite kategooria all on liiga palju abipileti kanaleid. Küsi, et administraator paneks mõned kinni, liigutaks neid teise kategooria alla või seadistaks ületäitumiskategooria.

See on **Discordi kehtestatud limiit** ehk maksimaalselt 50 kanalit igas kategoorias.
commands.premium:
Sa saad osta premium tellimuse siit: <%s>.
Premium annab palju kasulikke asju, nag näiteks:
```diff
+ Teha ükskõik kui palju abipiletite paneele
+
Muuta boti nime, pilti ja staatust(whitelabel)
+ Detailsed statistikad serveri kohta, kasutajad ja abi personaale
+ Bränding puudub jaluse osas
+ Toetada arengut ja aitada mul maksta serveri maksud
```

Alternatiivselt, saad sa hääletada siin <%s> et saada premium 24-ks tunniks tasuta
commands.premium.invalid_key: Ebasobiv võti. Tee kindlaks, et sa kopeerisid selle õigesti.
commands.remove.no_permission: Sul ei ole luba, et inimesi siit abipileti kanalist ära võtta
commands.remove.staff: Sa ei saa personaale abipiletist ära võtta
commands.removeadmin.no_members: Sa pead mentionima kasutaja või rolli millelt administraatori õigused ära võtta
commands.removeadmin.self: Sa ei saa endalt õigusi ära võtta
commands.removesupport.no_members: Sa pead mentionima kasutaja või rolli millele abipersonaali õigused lisada
commands.rename.missing_name: Sa pead täpsustama uue nime sellele abipiletite
commands.tags.create.already_exists: Silt, mille ID on `%s` juba eksisteerib. Sa saad silti kustutada koos `%s`
commands.tags.create.invalid_arguments: Sa pead täpsustama mingi sildi ID ja sisu
commands.tags.create.too_long: Sildi ID'd ei tohi olla pikem kui 16 tähemärki
commands.tags.delete.invalid_arguments: Sa pead täpsustama sildi ID mida kustutada
commands.tags.delete.not_exist: Silt mille ID on `%s` ei leitud
commands.tags.get.invalid_arguments: Sa pead edastama sildi ID. Kui on rohkem abi siltidega vaja, külasta <%s>.
commands.tags.get.invalid_tag: Ebasobiv silt. Kui on rohkem abi siltidega vaja, külasta <%s>.
commands.tags.list: ID'd kõikide siltide jaoks: \n%s\nEt vaadata siltide sisu, käivitada `%s`
commands.unclaim.not_claimer: Ainult administraatorid ja kasutaja kes võttis abipileti saab ära anda abipileti
commands.unclaim.success: Kõik abipersonaalid saavad nüüd vastata abipiletile
commands.vote:
Click the button below to vote for the bot and receive 24 hours of premium for free.

Once you have voted, run the %s command again to redeem your vote credits.

generic.owner_only: See käsk on reserveeritud ainult boti omanikule

premium.subscription_found_content: Et lisada tellimus sellele serverile, peah serveri omanik (<@%d>) sind lisama administraatori **kasutajaks** (rollid on ignoreeritud) kasutades %s käsku.\n\nSa saad kinnitada et sind on administraatoriks lisatud kasutades %s.
premium.success_after_check: Premium on nüüd aktiveeritud selles serveris!
premium.no_subscription: Ei leidnud aktiivset Patreoni tellimust sinu Discordi kasutajaga ühendatud. Kinnita et sa [ühendasid oma Patreoni ja Discordi kasutajad](%s), ja oota vähemalt 10 minutit.
premium.open_form_description: Vajuta alumist nuppu et uuesti avada form
premium.already_purchased_description: Kui sa oled juba premiumi ostnud, vali maksemeetod rippmenüüst et alustada

patreon.description: Vali see valik kui sa tegid oma tellimuse Patreonis

premium.about: Premium annab sulle juurdepääsu rohkem paneelidele, statistikale, kohandatud boti ja rohkem! Külasta meie [veebilehte](%s) et saada rohkem teada.
premium.already_activated: Head uudised! Premium on selles serveris juba aktiivne.
premium.already_activated_whitelabel:
Head uudised! Premium on selles serveris juba aktiivne.

Et saada abi whitelabeliga alustamisega, loe [meie whitelabeli seadistamisõpetust](%s).

discord.no_subscription:
Premiumit on võimalik osta Discordist otseselt. Vajutage all pool nuppu selle kirja all, et avada tellimuste haldamise leht.

Kui ostetud, palun oodake kuni 5 minutit, kuni tellimus on ära tuvastatud.

premium.subscription_found_content_modern: Teie Patreoni tellimus on leitud. Palun vajutage "Avage Serveri Valik" nupp tellimuse alt, et avada juhtpaneel, et saaksite valida millistele serverite tahate enda Premiumi tellimust lisada.

gdpr.intro: Valige, millist GPDR-i päringu tüüpi soovite teha:

section.transcript:
### **Transkripti Kustutamise Valikud**
-# _Kustutage transkriptid serveritest mida omate_
section.message:
### **Sõnumite Anonüümsuse Valikud**
-# _ Anonüümustage oma sõnumid transkriptidest valitud serveritest_

gdpr.warning:
### **Important Information**
* Deletion is **permanent** and cannot be undone
* You can only delete transcripts from servers **you** own
* Only **your** messages can be anonymized in transcripts
* The request may take up to **30 days** to complete
* Your request will be processed in a **queue**

[What is GDPR?](%s)

[Right of Access](%s)

followup.error: ⚠️ Your GDPR request encountered an error: %s
followup.no_data: ℹ️ Your GDPR request has been processed. No data was found.
followup.success: ✅ Your GDPR request has been processed successfully.

error.no_servers: No servers found where you are the owner and have transcripts.
error.invalid_ticket_ids: Invalid ticket IDs provided. Please enter numeric ticket IDs separated by commas (e.g., 123, 456, 789).
error.not_owner: You must be the server owner to delete transcripts.
error.queue_failed: Failed to queue GDPR request. Please try again later.
error.worker_offline: The GDPR processing service is currently unavailable. Please try again later or contact support if this issue persists.

errors.unknown_channel:
Could not find a required channel: it must have been deleted.

Please ask a server administrator to visit the [dashboard](%s) and verify all channel settings are configured correctly.
errors.unknown_member: The user could not be found. They may have left the server or been banned.
errors.unknown_message:
The message you're trying to interact with has been deleted.

Please try the action again with a different message.
errors.unknown_role:
The role required for this action no longer exists.

Please ask a server administrator to visit the [dashboard](%s) and reconfigure role settings.
errors.unknown_category:
Could not find a required category: it must have been deleted.

Please ask a server administrator to visit the [dashboard](%s) and assign a valid channel category to this ticket panel.
errors.unknown_interaction:
This interaction has expired.

Please try the action again.
errors.max_webhooks:
The server has reached the maximum number of webhooks.

Please ask a server administrator to remove some unused webhooks and try again.
errors.max_channels:
Your ticket could not be opened because this server has reached Discord's channel limit (500).

Please ask a server administrator to close some tickets or delete some unused channels before opening a new ticket.
errors.interaction_acknowledged:
This interaction has already been processed.

If you need to perform this action again, please start a new interaction.

missing_permissions.title: I am missing the following permissions required to perform this action
missing_permissions.body:
Please assign these permissions to the bot, or alternatively, the `Administrator` permission and try again.
Please visit our [docs](%s) for an explanation of why each permission is required.

errors.missing_access:
I am missing the permissions required to perform this action.

Please assign the necessary permissions to the bot, or alternatively, the `Administrator` permission and try again.
Please visit our [docs](%s) for an explanation of why each permission is required.
errors.invalid_length:
One or more fields are too short or too long.

Please ask a server administrator to visit the [dashboard](%s) and verify all inputs and ensure all fields meet the required length constraints.
errors.required_field:
A required field is missing or empty.

Please ask a server administrator to visit the [dashboard](%s) and verify all required fields are filled out.
errors.invalid_channel_type:
The channel type is invalid for this operation.

Please ask a server administrator to visit the [dashboard](%s) and assign a valid channel to the ticket panel.
errors.invalid_category:
The channel category is invalid, it must have been deleted.

Please ask a server administrator to visit the [dashboard](%s) and assign a valid category to the ticket panel.
errors.invalid_id:
An invalid ID was provided in the bot configuration.

Please ask a server administrator to visit the [dashboard](%s) and verify all category, channel, and role IDs are correct.
errors.invalid_characters:
The input contains invalid characters.

Please use only letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores.
errors.invalid_choice:
An invalid option was provided.

Please ask a server administrator to visit the [dashboard](%s) and verify all settings are correct.
errors.invalid_form: The action could not be completed due to invalid input.
errors.thread_locked:
Your ticket could not be opened because the ticket thread is locked.

Please ask a server administrator to unlock the ticket thread.
errors.max_active_threads:
Your ticket could not be opened because the maximum number of active threads has been reached in this channel.

Please ask a server administrator to close some tickets or threads.
errors.timed_out: The operation timed out, please try again.
errors.rate_limited: You're being rate limited. Please try again %s.
errors.rate_limited_global: Discord is experiencing high load (global rate limit). Please try again %s.
errors.general: An error occurred while performing this action.
